feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: The greatest city in the world: São Paulo
entry.content: This city literally puts entire European countries to shame: >a GDP rivaling nations >hottest women you will ever see >incredible combination of European, Japanese, and Latin American >some of the best weather all year round >every possible dish and entertainment venue It's what New York would be if NY had a soul

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Canadian Anon, I'm really angry right now
entry.content: I live in the worst third world shithole possible, blonde and ginger women are very rare, even if you find some, they all have brown or nigger trappers as their boyfriends because those women are too retarded. A Princess must marry a Prince, not a gangster orc. Also, I've noticed that white women and men are getting niggerfied, they are listening to nigger music and behaving like them. This is disgusting. Our ancestors must be paying a toll in hell for bringing niggers and browns to our countrie

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: SUMMARY REPORT ON THE RECENT PUBLIC BACKLASH AGAINST “LOVE AND DEEPSPACE”
entry.content: Since most of /v/ doesnt understand what, how or why the femcel game LAD just deleted their new CEO werewolf, here is the long version of everything that happened during the recent days. Recently, Love and Deepspace abruptly announced its sixth romanceable male lead, Valko, without any prior warning or narrative foreshadowing. This move triggered a massive, widespread boycott from the player base. Public outrage has escalated rapidly, erupting into a full-blown crisis of confidence and marking a

entry.content: Every day and night, every day and night. I can see your disco, disco dick is sucking my heart out of my mind. I'm outta time, I'm outta fucking time I'm a gasoline gut with a vaseline mind, but Wanna disco? Wanna see me disco? Let me hear you depoliticize my rhyme ONE! TWO! THREE! FOUR! You got what you been asking for you're so policy free and your fantasy wheels, AND EVERYTHING YOU THINK AND EVERYTHING YOU FEEL IS alright alright alright alll riiightt I take you home , now I watch me get you

entry.title: /news/ News: Socialist decides to take on 15-term Congressman
entry.content: > Melat Kiros was born in 1997, the year her representative in the U.S. House, Democrat Diana DeGette, took office. On Tuesday, Kiros hopes to unseat her. > The next frontier of the fight for the Democratic Party is in Denver, where DeGette, a 15-term incumbent and longtime progressive, is facing her most serious primary challenge yet from Kiros, a 29-year-old democratic socialist and first-time candidate. > Democrats’ widespread dissatisfaction and anger with their party leadership and a push f

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I was lied to by gsmarena.com
entry.content: I wanted a Sony Xperia, but as soon as I was about to buy one, Sony removed all their phones off their website. So I found a model off gsmarena, followed the link to Amazon for their US distributor, and $500 later found out this is not a US market phone, and is only partially compatible with US carriers. So now I got a gray market Xperia 10 VII with no functioning 5G and no WiFi calling, but that's about it. Gsmarena failed to specify which markets this phone is available in, and it figures, rig

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: You are a 80 yo man who wasted his whole life. Your entire life was about missed…
entry.content: You are a 80 yo man who wasted his whole life. Your entire life was about missed opportunities. Your entire personality is dissappointment, bitterness and resentment. You are old, sick and helpless. It's over. And now a miracle happened ... you just woke up this morning in your young body again. You got a second chance. From now on you only fap once a day to tig asian bitties and you only watch 20 minutes of anime. You start doing cardio regularly and learn monetizable skills. You will start thi

entry.title: /news/ News: Supreme Court Upholds Birthright, Denies Trump's Bid To Rewrite Citizenship
entry.content: Three losses in one week for Trump. He only has two friends on the court now ... Thomas and Alito. https://www.huffpost.com/entry/supr eme-court-rules-on-birthright-citiz enship_n_6a0f2eade4b0f1ba1f62e05b The Supreme Court upheld the Constitution’s guarantee that those born in the United States are automatically U.S. citizens, rejecting President Donald Trump’s attempt to rewrite one of the most sacred laws in the U.S. “Children born in the United States to parents unlawfully or temporarily pres

entry.content: >Working Hard Or Hardly Working Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /g/ Technology: Modern browser debates are so sad, arguing about the same Chromium and Gecko clo…
entry.content: Modern browser debates are so sad, arguing about the same Chromium and Gecko clones with meme extensions instead of the real browser wars where all the original fighters died. Unless Ladybird gets a billion dollar donation we are doomed to be in this pathetic situation forever. Cloudflare and Captchas blocking any browser that is actually good at tracker blocking just makes it worse.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Piracy will die this decade.
entry.content: They finally found a way to kill by making storage devices unaffordable (hard drives, ssds along with ram, gpus) or not producing it anymore (blu ray burners, internal optical drives). This will slowly suffocate the piracy scene because people won't be able to afford new backups, replace failing drives, expand storage, hoard data. Not to mention that all piracy related sites are going down rapidly one by one (rargb, vimm's lair, anime tosho, myrient and many others) or getting raped by cloudfare

entry.title: /int/ International: What is the nicest city and the ugliest city in your country, /int/? In my opini…
entry.content: What is the nicest city and the ugliest city in your country, /int/? In my opinion, the ugliest and worst city to live in in Mexico is Mexicali, which is just a bunch of maquiladoras in the Yuma Desert (the same one where Desert Valley) along the mouth of the Colorado River, next to the US-Mexican border. It's so fucking hot here that most people only go out at night, if at all. Also, it's got one of the highest murder rates in the whole world. The nicest one (in terms of looks) is probably eith

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: It shouldn't be allowed to call anything with zero calories an "energy drink". J…
entry.content: It shouldn't be allowed to call anything with zero calories an "energy drink". Just having some stimulants doesn't count as energy. Some isotonic sports drink with glusose or whatever is fine, but zero calorie monsters etc are not energy drinks. This is a jewish ploy btw as are many things meant to degenerate western society. Do not the goydrinks. Your fortune: Outlook good
